clientContext.purpose: evaluating a potential SaaS integration and commercial partnership
clientContext.transactionContext: The parties will exchange product roadmaps, technical product documents, pricing, customer requirements, and limited customer metadata.
specialConcerns: customer metadata may include personal data
technical security details will be shared

referenceTemplateText: MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT\n\nThe receiving party shall return or destroy confidential information upon written request. Unauthorized disclosure may cause irreparable harm and the disclosing party may seek injunctive relief. If personal data is shared, the receiving party shall apply reasonable security safeguards and notify the disclosing party of unauthorized access.
